channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Weather tracker: Tropical Cyclone Mitchell hits Western Australia
item.description: Affected coastal regions experience heavy rain, high tides and strong winds, with farms and businesses left damaged Tropical Cyclone Mitchell hit the ...

item.title: French police arrest nine people over suspected €10m Louvre ticket fraud
item.description: Prosecutors’ office says two museum workers, several tour guides and suspected mastermind among those detained French police investigating a suspected...

item.title: FDA refuses to consider Moderna flu shot in move experts claim is part of ‘anti-vaccine agenda’
item.description: Agency says application rejected due to lack of ‘adequate and well controlled’ trial, but experts say ‘they’re just coming up with reasons’ A senior U...

item.title: Florida man saves pregnant woman from drowning hours before baby’s birth
item.description: Logan Hayes jumped into pond to save Sheldy Apollon after she pulled over and accidentally drove into water A passerby jumped into a frigid Florida po...

item.title: High court rules ban on Palestine Action is unlawful – live
item.description: Protest group’s co-founder wins legal challenge; home secretary ‘disappointed’ by ruling and says government will appeal The high court upheld two gro...

item.title: GB men's curlers lose to Italy after shocking start
item.description: Team GB's men's curlers fight back against Italy after a poor start but lose their first match of the 2026 Winter Olympics.

item.title: Welsh rugby in turmoil as tens of thousands of Six Nations tickets still not sold
item.description: Thousands of tickets remain unsold, with one club chairman saying the matches are not worth it.

item.title: Rubio warns Europe of new era in geopolitics before big Munich speech
item.description: The US Secretary of State will address the first major transatlantic meeting since Donald Trump threatened to annex Greenland.

item.title: FBI releases description of suspect in Nancy Guthrie kidnapping
item.description: The 84-year-old mother of news anchor Savannah Guthrie disappeared from her Arizona home two weeks ago.

item.title: Zimbabwe clean up Australia for shock World Cup win
item.description: Blessing Muzarabani takes 4-17 as Zimbabwe beat Australia by 23 runs at the T20 World Cup.
